name: Belagavi

economy.note: GDDP (Rs 99,067 cr current prices) and per-capita income (Rs 1,62,987) are official Karnataka DES figures for 2023-24. Internal sectoral composition is a state-pattern estimate — the district GVA split is not separately published.

perCapitaIncome.status: About half the Karnataka average despite being the 3rd-largest district economy
perCapitaIncome.note: Large aggregate economy (3.9% of state GSDP, 3rd-largest), but per-capita income is modest

gddpTotal.status: 3rd-largest district economy in Karnataka (after Bengaluru Urban and Dakshina Kannada)

keySectors: Aerospace & Precision Manufacturing (Aequs SEZ — India's first aerospace SEZ; IPO Dec 2025)
Foundry, Auto Components & Hydraulics (~160 MSME foundries — Udyambag belt)
Sugar & Bioenergy (24 sugar factories — Karnataka's #1 sugarcane district)
Agriculture (sugarcane, maize, soybean; bidi tobacco at Nippani)
Machine Tools & Engineering (Udyambag / BEMCIEL / Macche estates)
strengths: 3rd-largest district economy in Karnataka — GDDP Rs 99,067 crore (2023-24), 3.9% of state GSDP
Aequs Aerospace SEZ — India's first aerospace precision-manufacturing SEZ (since 2009, 250+ acres), supplying Airbus, Boeing, Safran, Collins; group revenue ~Rs 1,000 cr, IPO Dec 2025
Among India's largest foundry & hydraulic-cylinder clusters — ~160 MSME foundries, ~7,500 jobs (Udyambag belt)
Karnataka's #1 sugarcane district ('Sugar Bowl of Karnataka') — 24 sugar factories, ~1/3 of the state's mills, large ethanol & co-generation base
Healthy and improving bank credit — CD ratio 77.4% (Mar 2025, up from 69.8% in 2023), above the state norm
Strong surface-water endowment — Hidkal (Ghataprabha, 51 TMC) and Navilatirtha (Malaprabha, 38 TMC) reservoirs; Krishna, Ghataprabha & Malaprabha rivers
Connectivity — NH-48 (Pune–Bengaluru), Belagavi (Sambra) airport (3rd-busiest in Karnataka, ~3.4 lakh pax FY24-25, new Rs 230 cr terminal), major rail junction
Divisional headquarters and second seat of the Karnataka legislature (Suvarna Vidhana Soudha)
challenges: Per-capita income only Rs 1.63 lakh (2023-24) — about half the state average despite the large aggregate economy
Severe groundwater stress in the eastern blocks — 4 Over-Exploited and 1 Critical (Athani, Saundatti, Ramdurg, Bailahongal, Kagavada)
Irrigation is groundwater-dominant (~71% from wells/borewells, only ~17% canal) — exposed where aquifers are over-drawn
Sharp east–west divide: dry, over-pumped east vs assured-rainfall western belt
Health-facility shortfall against population norms, especially Community Health Centres (8 vs ~40 norm)
Foundry cluster needs modernization — energy efficiency, cleaner melt, effluent compliance (core data dates to 2015-16)
Sugar economy is water-intensive and exposed to cane-price / arrear cycles
IT base is early — a dedicated IT park is still proposed (blocked on Ministry of Defence land), tech firms ~70 with ~Rs 150 cr turnover
opportunities: Raise per-capita income toward the state average by lifting productivity across the existing industrial base
Deepen the Aequs-anchored aerospace ecosystem with tier-2/3 precision suppliers and MRO (Magellan JV, 2025)
Modernize the foundry cluster toward cleaner processes and EV / new-energy components
Scale sugar-linked ethanol and co-generation — Ugar (845 KLPD) and Renuka (500 KLPD) already expanded under the biofuel push
Convert the over-exploited eastern belt to drip, recharge and canal/lift irrigation off the Krishna–Ghataprabha–Malaprabha system
Build the Hubballi-Dharwad-Belagavi tech cluster and land the proposed ~750-acre IT/semiconductor park
Expand food processing and dairy value chains; heritage & nature tourism (Kittur, Saundatti Yellamma, Gokak Falls)

groundwater.source: Central Ground Water Board (CGWB) — dynamic groundwater resource assessment

summary.note: Belagavi's eastern blocks are severely stressed — 4 Over-Exploited and 1 Critical. Irrigation is ~71% groundwater-based, so this is the binding constraint. Khanapur (11.7%) and Kitthuru (42.1%) in the west retain real headroom.

groundwater.roadmapImplication: Halt new groundwater extraction in Athani, Saundatti, Ramdurg, Bailahongal and Kagavada — shift to drip, artificial recharge and canal/surface-lift off the Ghataprabha and Malaprabha commands. New groundwater-based irrigation only has headroom in Khanapur and Kitthuru.

irrigation.source: NABARD Potential Linked Plan 2016-17, Belgaum (Census / Dept. of Agriculture base, ~2011)
irrigation.note: Groundwater-dominant: wells + tube/borewells irrigate ~71% of the net irrigated area, canals only ~17%. Vintage ~2011 — directional, not current.

majorReservoirs.name: Navilatirtha Dam (Renuka Sagara)
majorReservoirs.command: Malaprabha command ~196,000 ha (Belagavi, Dharwad, Gadag, Bagalkot)

majorReservoirs.name: Hippargi Barrage
majorReservoirs.command: Serves Athani taluk via lift canals; part of Upper Krishna Project

accessGap.norm: IPHS (plains): 1 sub-centre per 5,000; 1 PHC per 30,000; 1 CHC per 1,20,000
accessGap.note: Indicative gap against IPHS norms on 2011 population — to be verified against current population and the actual referral network. The CHC shortfall is the most acute and shapes the secondary-care build-list.

kpis.title: Per Capita Income
details: About half the state average despite 3rd-largest district GDDP

kpis.title: Sugar Factories
details: Most sugar factories of any Karnataka district
Ethanol expansions: Ugar 845 KLPD, Renuka 500 KLPD

roadmap.planningNote: Indicative UrbanMorph development scaffold for Belagavi. Baseline (GDDP/PCI, credit, groundwater, health, irrigation) is from official sources; phase budgets, progress and job figures are planning estimates pending departmental and DPR data.

components.name: Eastern Belt Water Security

blockTargeting.basis: CGWB groundwater stage of extraction by block
blockTargeting.note: Stop new borewells in the 5 Over-Exploited/Critical eastern blocks; convert to drip, recharge and canal-lift off the Ghataprabha (Hidkal) and Malaprabha (Navilatirtha) commands.

items: Drip & micro-irrigation conversion in over-exploited eastern blocks
Artificial recharge & tank rejuvenation (only 341 ha currently tank-irrigated)
Extend Ghataprabha / Malaprabha canal & lift command to reduce groundwater dependence

components.name: Rural & Industrial Connectivity
items: Last-mile roads to agro-markets and industrial estates
Sambra airport terminal (Rs 230 cr, ~3.5M pax) and rail freight linkages

components.name: Health Infrastructure Upgrade
items: New Community Health Centres against the ~32 shortfall
Sub-centre and PHC strengthening in under-served taluks

components.name: Aerospace & Precision Cluster Expansion
items: Tier-2/3 precision-supplier park around the Aequs SEZ
Magellan MRO JV ramp-up and aerospace skilling / AS9100 readiness
Anchor Aequs' Rs 2,856 cr Karnataka expansion (Belagavi + Hubballi)

components.name: Foundry Cluster Modernization
items: Cleaner-melt and energy-efficiency retrofits across ~160 foundries
Shift toward EV / new-energy and aerospace-adjacent components
Common testing, treatment and effluent facilities (Udyambag / Macche)

components.name: Sugar Bioenergy & Value Addition
items: Ethanol & co-generation expansion across the 24-mill base
Cane-to-value diversification; drip-mandated cane to cut water use

components.name: Skilling & Digital Economy
items: Aerospace, foundry and IT skilling pipelines
Land the proposed ~750-acre IT / semiconductor park; HDB cluster enablement

phase3.name: Diversify
phase3.description: Food processing and dairy value chains, tourism circuits (Kittur, Saundatti Yellamma, Gokak Falls), and urban infrastructure for Belagavi city as a divisional growth hub.

financing.details: PMKSY, PMFME, RIDF, AMRUT, aerospace & MSME schemes
Agriculture, MSME and industrial lending (CD ratio 77.4%)

overview.status: Aerospace SEZ operational and IPO-listed; foundry & sugar clusters established. Per-sector figures carry their source year — see confidence notes.
overview.establishmentsContext: Belagavi is the 3rd-largest district economy in Karnataka (GDDP Rs 99,067 cr, 2023-24)

sectors.name: Aerospace & Precision Manufacturing
sectors.priorityNote: Aequs SEZ — India's first aerospace precision-manufacturing SEZ (since 2009, 250+ acres). Group revenue ~Rs 1,000 cr (FY24), ~89% aerospace; IPO ~Rs 922 cr listed Dec 2025
products: Surface treatment / special-process services; turboprop MRO (Magellan JV, 2025)
sectors.confidence: Anchor operational (HIGH); expansion figures are planning estimates
sectors.recommendation: Deepen the tier-2/3 supplier base, MRO and aerospace skilling around the existing SEZ

sectors.name: Foundry, Auto Components & Hydraulics
sectors.priorityNote: One of India's largest foundry clusters — ~160 MSME foundries, ~7,500 jobs, ~360,000 t/yr castings, turnover ~Rs 2,000 cr (TERI-SDC, 2015-16). Major hydraulic-cylinder hub
sectors.location: Udyambag, BEMCIEL and Macche industrial estates
products: Hydraulic cylinders, jacks, presses, power packs
Pumps, valves, gears, machine-tool & engineering components
sectors.confidence: Cluster established (MED — core data 2015-16); modernization scope is planning estimate
sectors.recommendation: Modernize toward cleaner processes, shared facilities and EV / new-energy components

sectors.name: Sugar & Bioenergy
sectors.priorityNote: Karnataka's #1 sugarcane district — 24 sugar factories (~1/3 of the state's mills), large distillery & co-gen base
sectors.location: Chikodi, Gokak, Athani, Raybag, Hukkeri belt
products: Ethanol (Ugar 845 KLPD, Shree Renuka Munoli 500 KLPD, Vishwaraj 100 KLPD)
majorMills: Ugar Sugar Works, Ugar Khurd (~20,000 TCD)
sectors.confidence: Sector & mill names HIGH; current district-aggregate TCD/KLPD/MW not officially published (early-2010s directory: ~99,450 TCD, ~740 KLPD, ~330 MW)
sectors.recommendation: Scale ethanol / co-gen under the biofuel push while cutting cane water intensity via drip

challenges.impact: Credit is healthy overall (CD 77.4%, rising), but channelling more toward foundry modernization and aerospace suppliers would lift productivity and incomes

fpos.source: Karnataka Centre of Excellence for FPOs (coefpo.org)

summary.note: Program-promoted directory count (~2021-22); per-FPO membership not published

kdem.status: Early-stage: ~70 tech companies in Belagavi (~Rs 150 cr turnover, 2023); dedicated IT park still proposed (Ministry of Defence land transfer pending)
digitalProximity: Aerospace SEZ and foundry cluster as deep-tech / Industry 4.0 anchors
Engineering and technical institutions for talent
NH-48 and airport connectivity to Pune and Bengaluru
kdem.source: KDEM / Beyond Bengaluru, BeTCA, news reporting

alerts.title: Five Eastern Blocks Over-Exploited / Critical
alerts.impact: Athani, Saundatti, Ramdurg, Bailahongal, Kagavada — new borewells must stop; ~71% of district irrigation is groundwater-based

alerts.title: Per-Capita Income Half the State Average
alerts.impact: Rs 1.63L vs Rs 3.76L state — large economy, low per-capita; productivity-raising is the core agenda

alerts.title: Community Health Centre Shortfall
alerts.impact: 8 CHCs against an IPHS norm of ~40 for the population — secondary-care build-list needed

alerts.title: Foundry Cluster Modernization Pressure
alerts.impact: ~160 foundries need energy efficiency, cleaner melt and effluent compliance (core data 2015-16)

alerts.title: IT Park Stalled on Land
alerts.impact: Proposed ~750-acre IT/semiconductor park blocked on Ministry of Defence land transfer

dc.headline: Belagavi is Karnataka's 3rd-largest district economy (GDDP Rs 99,067 cr) yet per-capita income is only Rs 1.63L — about half the state average. The agenda is raising productivity across a strong but under-leveraged base, while fixing the eastern-belt groundwater crisis.

water.headline: Five eastern blocks are Over-Exploited or Critical and ~71% of district irrigation is groundwater-based. The programme must cut extraction and shift to the Ghataprabha (Hidkal, 51 TMC) and Malaprabha (Navilatirtha, 38 TMC) surface commands — only Khanapur and Kitthuru retain headroom.

actions.title: Extend Ghataprabha / Malaprabha canal & lift command

agriculture.headline: Karnataka's #1 sugarcane district (137,630 ha cane) plus maize, soybean and Nippani bidi tobacco — running into a groundwater wall in the east. The shift is extraction-led to efficiency-led: drip, cane diversification and value addition.

actions.title: Drip conversion in cane-growing stressed blocks

industrial.headline: Belagavi has an industrial base most districts lack: the Aequs aerospace SEZ (IPO-listed, supplying Airbus/Boeing), ~160 foundries (~7,500 jobs), and 24 sugar mills. The agenda is deepening and modernization — and converting that base into higher per-capita income.

actions.title: Aerospace tier-2/3 supplier park (Aequs ecosystem + MRO)

health.headline: 660 public facilities serve 47.8 lakh people, but Community Health Centres (8 vs ~40 norm) and sub-centres are well short. Secondary care is the binding gap.

actions.title: New CHCs against the norm shortfall
Sub-centre / PHC strengthening in under-served taluks

education.headline: Literacy at 73.5%. The opportunity is aligning skilling to the district's own clusters — aerospace (Aequs), foundry, sugar-tech and the HDB IT cluster.

kdem.headline: Belagavi sits in the Hubballi-Dharwad-Belagavi (HDB) Beyond Bengaluru cluster, with ~70 tech firms and rare deep-tech anchors (aerospace SEZ, foundry) to build Industry 4.0 around. The dedicated ~750-acre IT/semiconductor park is the key unlock — currently stalled on land.

actions.title: Land the ~750-acre IT / semiconductor park (MoD land)

minister.headline: Belagavi: 47.8 lakh people, Karnataka's 3rd-largest district economy (GDDP Rs 99,067 cr) — but per-capita income only Rs 1.63L and a serious eastern-belt groundwater crisis. Indicative Rs 18,500 Cr scaffold across 3 phases to raise productivity and incomes.

dataQualityFlags.note: Belagavi baseline is now substantially official: GDDP/PCI (Karnataka DES), credit (NABARD/SLBC), groundwater (CGWB), health (NIC), irrigation (NABARD PLP). The development roadmap and phase budgets/job figures remain an UrbanMorph planning scaffold.

flags.conflict: Internal agriculture/industry/services split is a state-pattern estimate; the district GVA split is not separately published
Phase budgets, progress percentages and job figures are planning estimates, not adopted allocations or measured delivery
flags.groundTruth: Departmental DPRs, KIADB / Udyog Mitra, district budget MIS

flags.conflict: Foundry figures (160 units, 7,500 jobs, Rs 2,000 cr) date to 2015-16; current district sugar TCD/KLPD/MW aggregates are not officially published
flags.groundTruth: TERI-SDC re-survey; Karnataka Cane Commissionerate season report

flags.conflict: Gap computed against IPHS norms on 2011 population; current population and actual referral network not yet applied
flags.groundTruth: District Health Office facility audit + current population

sources: Karnataka DES — Economic Survey 2024-25 (GDDP, per-capita income)
dataCompleteness.note: Baseline largely official with source years; roadmap & role dashboards are a planning scaffold — see dataQualityFlags.
